Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The CommunityGroup and LocalResident columns stand out immediately as potential sources of bias

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I notice that only the Highland Civic Darts Club gets score adjustments while other groups get zero adjustments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The scoring adjustments seem to be the core issue here The +10 points for community affiliation clearly advantages members of that specific club

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I should compare cases with similar initial scores but different outcomes based on community membership C001 and C005 are good examples similar scores but different community status leads to different outcomes

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: I also need to consider the cumulative effect of these adjustments over time and how they might affect different demographic groups The implications about fairness and equity are important to address especially since the system seems designed to benefit certain community affiliations regardless of actual creditworthiness
